title: The Nether Dungeons
description: I have added a dungeon that spawns at the depths of the nether which has a summing room where you have a chance to summon 3 different bosses.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c11d023ea4a24001fef248d5bdcb43c47549f53_0.webp)


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rnHYnToCUac" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


NEW ADDITIONS 
A new Sword and Axe
4 new items such as Blood, Summoner Eye, Crying Ingot, Crying Smithing Template.
3 New Staffs that shoot eggs, snowballs, and Fireballs
New Crying Armor
And 3 New advancments 
Structure

I have made a dungeon that spawns in around y = 10 and spawns like a maze with there being a chance of finding chest or by finding the summoner room which you can then go and spawn one of the 3 bosses.

Mobs

Once you find the summing room you have a 33.33% chance of spawning each mob which are

Summoner Skeleton

This skeleton is able to spawn wither vexs and able to spawn tiny little crying wither skeletons aswell and acts just like an evoker on death it drops a summoner eye which can be used to craft the staffs

Mega Wither Skeleton

This guy explodes once summoned and is just a normal wither but way stronger and on death he drops a crying ingot which can be used in a smithing table to make armor and you find the Crying smithing template in a random chest inside of the nether dungeon.

Dying Skeleton

This one he spawns very slow and dealing good damage but not that bad but everytime he drops health by 100 his attack and speed both increase making him going from easy to very hard to kill and on death he drops blood which can then be put on a netherite sword or axe in a crafting table.
